issues.description: Action type is 'KO' but card text says 'Place...at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be 'ReturnToHand' or similar deck placement action, not KO
Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacter' but card says 'a Character' (unspecified owner) — should allow opponent's characters or use broader scope
Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect — [DON!! x1] means costs 1 DON to activate, should use 'HasAttachedDon' with count:1 or similar resource cost model

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [On Block] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 2 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.
